name: collection-mixin-pattern
description: CollectionPersistable mixin pattern: types.model() with .views() for context derivation and .actions() for async operations. Uses getEnv<IEnvironment>(self) for dependency injection. Composed via types.compose(BaseCollection, Mixin).named(name).
recommendation: CollectionQueryable should follow identical pattern: views for query() builder factory, actions for async terminal operations
